body.short_description: Recurring MFA bypass via legacy SMTP AUTH on shared mailboxes
body.description: Problem identified via incident pattern analysis: 4 incidents over 30 days share root cause. Shared mailbox accounts in Exchange Online are not subject to the Conditional Access policy enforcing MFA, allowing SMTP AUTH as a legacy protocol bypass vector. Root cause requires a policy architecture change. Controls: IA-2, AC-17.
body.workaround: Block SMTP AUTH at the tenant level via Exchange Online transport rule as interim mitigation pending permanent fix.

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse result.sys_id (32-char hex) and store it as the problem canonical identifier.
Adapter MUST map result.number to the canonical ticket_number claim (PRB-prefixed string).
Adapter MUST treat result.state == '1' as OpenProblem lifecycle state.
Adapter MUST emit a ProblemRecord claim citing controls IA-2 (from uiao_control_id) and surface the workaround text.
Adapter MUST parse related_incidents as a list of incident references and emit IncidentLink claims for each.
Adapter MUST set known_error=false on the canonical claim and NOT emit a KnownError claim when the field is 'false'.

primary_citation.quote: Inserts one record in the specified table.

supporting_citation.quote: Problem management is the process responsible for managing the lifecycle of all problems.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. sys_id values are deterministic synthetic 32-char hex strings. Agency code DOJ is from the canonical UIAO agency list. User and group references replaced with synthetic identifiers.
